mapper.select: SELECT user_uuid AS "userUuid", user_email AS "userEmail", user_password AS "userPassword", user_name AS "userName", user_profile_image AS "userProfileImage", user_gender AS "userGender", user_birth_date AS "userBirthDate", user_bio AS "userBio", user_status AS "userStatus", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt", deleted_at AS "deletedAt" FROM users WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid}::uuid
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_name = #{userName}, user_profile_image = #{userProfileImage}, user_gender = #{userGender}, user_birth_date = #{userBirthDate}, user_bio = #{userBio}, user_password = #{userPassword}, user_status = #{userStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT user_uuid AS "userUuid", user_email AS "userEmail", user_password AS "userPassword", user_name AS "userName", user_profile_image AS "userProfileImage", user_gender AS "userGender", user_birth_date AS "userBirthDate", user_bio AS "userBio", user_status AS "userStatus", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt", deleted_at AS "deletedAt" FROM users WHERE user_email = #{userEmail}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_status = 'INACTIVE', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid}::uuid
